entry.title: Re: SAP Customer Data Cloud Back and Restore
entry.content:
Hi @Rvanjari ,

Good day.

As you are aware, there is no out-of-the-box functionality in CDC for Backup or Restore. But you can consider the following options for taking backup.

  1. Site Policies and Email Templates Backup:

    • You can back up all site policies and email templates using the accounts.getPolicies API.

  2. User Data Export:

    • You can periodically export user data using CDC's Data Access API or Bulk Data Extracts to create backups.
    • The exported data can be securely stored and used for restoration if required.

Regards,
Preethi G
SAP CDC Developer

Riya Shakya

But how that I am too figuring out. 

Let me know if you were able to achieve it.

entry.title: AI in SAP SuccessFactors: Revolutionizing HR with Transformative System Architecture
entry.content:
In today’s fast-evolving digital world, artificial intelligence (AI) is no longer just a futuristic concept; it's a transformative force in human resources (HR). SAP SuccessFactors, a leading cloud-based Human Capital Management (HCM) solution, has embraced AI technologies, reshaping how businesses manage talent, optimize operations, and make data-driven decisions. As AI continues to impact HR processes, the architecture of systems like SuccessFactors must evolve to support these innovations, enhancing scalability, integration, and security. This article explores how AI is integrated into SAP SuccessFactors and the resulting impact on its system architecture.

The Role of AI in SAP SuccessFactors

AI’s integration into SAP SuccessFactors is revolutionizing how businesses approach human capital management. By embedding AI across its key modules, SuccessFactors brings intelligent automation, advanced analytics, and predictive capabilities to HR practices. Key areas where AI plays a significant role include:

Recruitment & Talent Acquisition

AI-driven tools such as chatbots and machine learning algorithms are transforming the recruitment process. AI helps by screening resumes faster and more accurately, matching candidates to job profiles based on a wide range of variables. Predictive analytics also enable organizations to identify top candidates early in the process, streamlining hiring and improving candidate experience.

Employee Engagement & Development

AI’s ability to process vast amounts of data enables the development of personalized learning and development plans for employees. By assessing performance trends and individual strengths, AI can recommend customized career growth paths. Additionally, AI-powered sentiment analysis tools help measure employee engagement and satisfaction, providing actionable insights that HR leaders can use to foster a positive workplace culture.

Workforce Planning & Analytics

AI-powered analytics enable organizations to predict workforce trends, optimize resource allocation, and improve overall decision-making. These insights help HR departments plan for future workforce needs, identify potential skill gaps, and forecast employee turnover—all of which lead to more informed and effective workforce strategies.

AI-Powered Features in SuccessFactors

Several AI-driven features are already being used across SAP SuccessFactors, driving more efficient HR processes:

Intelligent Recruiting

SuccessFactors’ AI-based recruiting tools not only speed up resume screening but also help HR professionals find the best candidate matches. By leveraging natural language processing (NLP) and machine learning, AI can analyze candidate profiles and rank them based on fit with job requirements, ensuring that the right person is hired for the job.

People Analytics

SuccessFactors’ people analytics module uses AI to mine data from multiple sources, providing actionable insights about employee performance, engagement, and retention. For instance, AI models can predict which employees are at risk of leaving, allowing HR teams to intervene and reduce turnover. Additionally, AI-driven diversity and inclusion analytics help organizations ensure fair and equitable hiring practices.

Employee Experience

AI in SuccessFactors is not just about improving business processes; it’s about enhancing the employee experience. AI-driven recommendations suggest personalized training, career development opportunities, and well-being programs tailored to the individual, ensuring employees receive the resources they need to succeed.

Automated HR Operations

AI-powered automation eliminates repetitive HR tasks, such as payroll processing, attendance tracking, and leave management. By automating these functions, HR professionals can focus on more strategic activities while improving the accuracy and efficiency of administrative operations.

Impact of AI on System Architecture

AI brings significant changes to the underlying system architecture of SAP SuccessFactors. The introduction of AI capabilities requires the platform to be adaptable, scalable, and capable of handling large amounts of complex data. Let’s explore the architectural shifts brought about by AI:

Scalability

AI systems require massive data processing power, especially when it comes to training machine learning models. As AI technologies become increasingly integral to SuccessFactors, the system architecture must be designed to scale quickly and handle large volumes of real-time data. Cloud-based infrastructure provides the necessary elasticity to accommodate growing data needs and to support AI-driven capabilities at scale.

Integration with Existing Modules

SuccessFactors integrates AI seamlessly into its existing modules, such as Employee Central, Learning, and Performance Management. This enables a smooth transition for HR teams to adopt new features without disrupting existing workflows. The system’s architecture supports these integrations by using APIs and microservices, which allow the AI features to interact with other modules and enhance overall functionality.

Data Storage & Management

AI models in SuccessFactors rely heavily on vast amounts of data. This makes effective data storage and management crucial. The platform utilizes advanced cloud storage solutions and real-time data processing capabilities, ensuring that AI models can access and analyze data quickly and efficiently. Real-time data processing also ensures that AI-driven insights are delivered instantly, allowing HR leaders to make informed decisions on the fly.

Cloud Infrastructure & Performance

AI technologies demand high-performance computing power. The cloud infrastructure supporting SAP SuccessFactors is designed to offer low latency and high availability, ensuring that AI-powered features operate smoothly across global environments. Whether it’s predictive analytics or real-time insights, the cloud infrastructure enables businesses to harness the full potential of AI without compromising performance.

Security & Compliance

With AI’s reliance on sensitive employee data, ensuring robust security is paramount. SuccessFactors’ system architecture prioritizes data privacy and compliance with regional regulations, such as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). AI-powered tools are designed with security measures to ensure that employee data remains protected and that AI-driven processes are compliant with legal frameworks.

The Future of AI in SuccessFactors

As AI continues to evolve, the future of SAP SuccessFactors looks promising. We can expect even more advanced predictive capabilities that help HR professionals anticipate employee needs, improve retention, and optimize workforce performance. AI-driven personalized career development and well-being programs could become more prevalent, ensuring a holistic approach to employee satisfaction.

Moreover, the ability to make real-time, data-driven decisions will only grow stronger, empowering HR departments to drive business outcomes faster and more effectively.

entry.title: How to hide some "screen" on MDG
entry.content:
Hello team, 

In the context of GDPR, I would like to hide the BANK ACCOUNT section based on a role assigned to the user.

To access MDG, I go through the Fiori launchpad.

Do you know if it is possible to hide certain screens based on roles in MDG? If so, how can it be done?

Thanks


PI : 
BS_BP_BANK_ACCOUNT id of UIBB of BANK ACCOUNT in web dynpro BS_SP_OVP

entry.title: Re: Editability of custom fields in SD_BILLINGDOC
entry.content:
Hello @nitin-jagtap08

we did not succeed. Finally I deactivated the fields on the custom fields tab, as they are anyways informed in the sales order and transferred to the billing document by copy control. In that case it's not possible to change the value anymore in the VFxx transactions, but that's better than having them ready for input in any case.

Regards
Sebastian

entry.title: Re: How to select managedStores from Employee type in Fle...
entry.content:
Example that you are describing is that you want to list relation objects and in case of relations they are not persisted within the item type itself but there is separate table created for it which you would need to query in order to get results.

To identify what type you would need to query you might need to check Employee type in Backoffice:

1. Enter Backoffice>Types>Employee>Properties
2. Enter Properties tab
3. Search for property named managedStores and click triple dot button>Edit details
4. If property is RelationDescriptor then search for "Relation Type" field and doubleclick it.
5. Use its identifier to run flexible search.

Note: In order to get results associated with certain employee, identify source and target item types and modify query by including employee pk in "where" clause.

entry.title: Re: HANA Studio on OSX - BW Modeling Issue
entry.content: in regards of not showing the unassigned navs of source providers, restarting Eclipse should solve the issue. quite old bug I've learned.

entry.title: Version data available in JVTO1 table in sap
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Good day

In JVTO1 table in sap which is JV Summary Table can we add new versions in there to fetch the data ?

We have received a query from business that they have loaded values in budget version TS2 which is for Group Budget reporting. However when they look in table JVTO1 those values do not appear and also we cannot see version TS2 in JVTO1 table under versions.

So kindly help to understand what types of version values can we see in JVTO1 table as business wants to know why some versions are available and some are not in JVTO1 table

entry.title: How to automate the update of certificates in STRUST
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I am looking for a way to automate the certificate update process in STRUST as much as possible. The idea is to have a program that downloads the certificate from the corresponding platform or connector and imports it into the STRUST transaction. Does anyone know if something like this already exists or if there is a similar solution that could be adapted?

Best regards, and thanks!

entry.title: Re: Combine selection and counting of values from database
entry.content: And what's you version, many new options are available in Abap SQL recent versions

entry.title: Re: Combine selection and counting of values from database
entry.content:
@raymond_giuseppi 7.50 😞

@Sandra_Rossi 

SELECT
  FROM
    matnr_table
  FIELDS
    matnr,
    COUNT( matnr )
  INTO TABLE
    @DATA(result).


SELECT
  FROM
    matnr_table
  FIELDS
    matnr,
    ( SELECT FROM matnr FIELDS COUNT(*) ) AS count
  INTO TABLE
    @DATA(result).

entry.title: How the JEV affect the budget
entry.content:
Dear SAP support team
We can not find information, how the JEV affect the budget



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How the JEV affect the budget
entry.content:
In SAP Business ByDesign, Journal Entry Vouchers (JEVs) may affect the budget if they involve expense accounts linked to cost centers or internal orders that are part of the budgeting process. However, if the JEV is related to balance sheet accounts (e.g., cash, payables) or internal adjustments, it will not impact the budget.

You can track the budget impact through reports like Budget Consumption

Please let us know if you need further details or assistance in reviewing budget-related entries.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: CDS annotations to Show / Hide fields on Fiori based...
entry.content: Try using ![@UI.Hidden]: { $value: (<your field> = true) }

entry.title: Re: Community edition Web build error.
entry.content:
UPDATE. 2025.02.12. late afternoon CET the build issues have been resolved with the runtime 4.12.192. 

Apparently, it had nothing to do with the app size. Still, I'd strongly suggest revisiting your logic on a regular basis and trying to reduce the unused, hidden, or commented parts.

I have already tried with the user name: SAP* and with the password: Down1oad. Unfortunately without success.

Please help me, as I don't know which password I could use to successfully log into SAP.

Many thanks in advance!

Kind Regards

Proxima

entry.title: Re: ABAP Runtime Analysis (SE30) - How to analyze ABAP program flow
entry.content:
Hi @KavitaMane ,

such analysis should take place in the ATC central check system, in the checked system you will not get the needed information using ATC on BTP. As I already recommended you, please open a ticket to SAP with regard to performance analysis of your ATC run.

Thanks & Kind Regards,
Olga.

Adrian

entry.title: Re: SAP Convergent Charging: Error invalidConfiguration (...
entry.content:
Hi Paolo,

Convergent Charging will only report that the table doesn't exist if that table hasn't effectively been saved into its database.
For now, the error suggests that the provisioning requests (for the agreement table) are sent to CC slightly too late.
You can verify by reproducing the issue after having enabled the WS debug traces in the CC updater (this will show you precisely when the agreement table is created, and if it should be earlier).

Please let us know if you need any more guidance.

Best regards.

François
SAP Convergent Charging Support

entry.title: Re: Is SAP Enable Now the best solution for SAP implement...

entry.title: Re: Asset Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:

If you miss features regarding Asset Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, I recommend you visit our Customer Influence and Adoption page in the SAP Community: Customer Influence and Adoption | SAP Community. 

There, you can find information on how influence SAP software development, adopt new innovations early on, and request specific enhancements or features.

entry.title: SuccessFactors AI - AI-Assisted Goal Creation - translation (Set up and hints)
entry.content:
AI Assisted Performance and Development Goal Creation is related to the latest version of the PMGM Module and helps your employees / manager creating better and smarter goals.

The effort to implement it is very low.

 

Create personal goals, including performance and development goals, based on an employee’s description of what they want to achieve. Upon content review, if users update their input and regenerate content, they can compare the original content with AI-generated content and choose which one to use.

 

 

To get the goal creation tool activated some small steps are needed.

1. Fullfill the pre-requisites: you have to have licenses for AI Units and use the newest version of Goal Management

2. Activate the function

With the AI Units you will find a new admin page in SuccessFactors where you can activate AI Scenarios (AI Service Administration). Grant the permissions to this page to your user to manage the AI Scenarios.

 

 

 

In this application (AI Service Administration) you have to activate Assisted Performance Goals and/or Assisted Development Goal. With this setting you have activated the function in overall.

 

 

 

 

3. Assign permissions to your users

To make sure users can use the function add the scenarios to the relevant permission roles.

With activation of AI functions we have a new RBP category available under user permissions -> AI Access

Select the "Assisted Performance Goals" and/ or "Assisted Development Goals" permissions.

 

DONE 😉

 

Result:

Your users can now find the AI function during Goal Creation.

Let us have a look to Performance Goals. Users can create a new Goal based on the regular functions (e.g. from scratch) or they can now use the AI to help them to generate it.

 

After adding the title of the goal you can press the "generate" button and AI will do the magic.

Our Business AI functions has filled all the fields including customer fields.

Based on the Goal Template where you define the fields in the background the promt is generated, result is created and shown on the UI.

Employees has to validate the result and can change if needed.

Here they can also use the "AI Assisted Writing" Options if activated (SuccessFactors AI - AI-assisted writing and writin... - SAP Community)

 

For transparency reason, people who can see the employees goal can also see that the Goal was created by the usage of AI.

 

 

Sneak Peak to the current available Roadmap for AI in Goal Management (planned for H1 2025):

- AI Assisted Team Goals

- AI-assisted goal creation with Joule

 

 

 

 

 

Additional links:

- GenAI features self-activation step by step with s... - SAP Community

- SuccessFactors AI - AI based Skill-Topics in Recru... - SAP Community

- SuccessFactors AI - Job Description Enhancement (S... - SAP Community

-SuccessFactors AI - AI-assisted writing and writin... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Bank statement in XML format
entry.content:
Hi @Bohdan , I hope you don't mind me raising my question here as I was not able to find a dedicated blog post from you on SAP posting rules and their interpretation algorithms.

In one SAP client we use are successfully using posting rules with interpretation algorithm "20 020: Document Number Search" with our CAMT.053 statements to automatically clear open payment documents. In this client, bank statement transactions and payment documents are posted to the same clearing account so the algorithm does not have any issues finding open payment documents as long as the amount and document numbers match.

Now we are implementing electronic bank statement processing in another SAP client and have set up our posting rules in a similar way, using algorithm "20 020: Document Number Search" for clearing of open payment documents. However, here payment run posts payment documents on one clearing account and the bank statement is posted to another clearing account - essentially two different clearing accounts are used instead of one. And in my testing I cannot get SAP to automatically clear my open payment documents during electronic bank statement processing.

My question is: can it be that SAP interpretation algorithms only work as long as both the bank transaction document (that is being posted) and an open payment document (that I want the algorithm to find and clear) are on the same clearing account? And if two or more clearing accounts are used the algorithm will not find those open documents to clear?

entry.title: A/P Invoice direct posting against more than one Condition Contracts
entry.content:
Dear Guru,

we need to manage the following requirements through Condition Contracts functionality (already live since 2020): posting an "A/P Customer Invoice" (i.e Customer is sending to the Company an external invoice to claim the deferred discounts), via the "Manual Settlement" process (i.e WB2R_DOC_ENTRY), against more than one Condition Contract.

Please consider the following examples to clarify:

Total A/P Invoice Amount = €1.000, to be split among Contracts:

  • Contract A = €600
  • Contract B = €300
  • Contract C = €100

The main business concern is how to comply with fiscal and audit requirements since the Settlement Amount (linked to one unique invoice) should be split and reconciled against different contracts. Given the above requirement, which standard feature from Condition Contracts can satisfy it? Should we activate "Manual Settlement with the 2-step process" (i.e. collection document)? Are there other alternatives?

Thanks

Michele

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content: We have observed that users on global assignments (HOST) are able to view the learning content from the New Learning Home page. However, this option is not available on the Legacy Home page." if they need to launch the content they have to switch the HOME record from the new learning homepage

entry.title: Re: 订单结算报错消息号 MLCCS009
entry.content: 打上 note 3441083

entry.title: Re: Printing duplex with GraphicLocationFormula
entry.content:
Thank you very much for your reply.
My apologies for not correctly reporting the CrystalReports version used.
Currently, we use SAP CrystalReports 2013 as a designer, and for development, the SAP Crystal Reports Runtime engine for .NET framework (32 bits), version 13.0.16.1954 libraries
 
This is a brief example of the code used to print (direct to printer without preview)
Public WithEvents CRReport As CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine.ReportDocument
...
With CRReport
...
.ReadRecords()
If .ReportRequestStatus.NumberOfRecordSelected > 0 Then
.PrintToPrinter(1, False, 0, 0)
End If
End With
 
Duplex printing does not work in this situation, after incorporating GraphicLocation formula to inform the image path.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA –Finding authorization objects for SAP Fiori apps with SU24
entry.content: Hi, thank you for the blog. I have question about how to correctly define BCs. Let´s say I have business catalog with 10 apps. I refer to this BC from Space and put 5 apps to Page of this Space. Now I create role and assign it to user. As in the backend role I need to put reference to both Space and Catalogue, then user gets whole set of apps that are in BC. He may not see them in his Space, but is able to search for them (via search bar) and can use them. Is there a way how to restrict this? Or is this concept wrong and I should create BC for each user/user group? So the granularity of the BCs will be really detailed? Many thanks @Jocelyn_Dart

entry.title: Subcontracting with Chargeable Components - info category Chargeable missing
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to use Subcontracting with Chargeable Components, and I activated Business Function /SAPNEA/J_SCC_BF.

I followed this procedure : https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/26b08c9979fa435faafcf6033ca0cf93/4bfddd7f0b0e3de4e10000000a42189e.html

Customizing is done and transportated. BF is activated in all my clients.

If I enter in ME11 in my customizing client, I have now a new info category "Chargeable".

 

But in my test client, I don't have it. Yet there is the value in Data element / Domain ESOKZ (from EINE).

Any idea ? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: How to make a mdc table editable?
entry.content: Solved it by using mdc.Field and controlling the `editMode`

entry.title: Re: Goods issue not posting for HPM Materials

entry.title: Re: Couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Apps. Try again.
entry.content: Getting same issue from past 2 days. Please post solution if you get it.

entry.title: Condition Contract - Distribution process
entry.content:
Dear Guru,

We need to manage the following requirements through Condition Contracts functionality (already live since 2020): posting a "Customer Credit Note" via the "Manual Settlement" process (i.e WB2R_DOC_ENTRY), along with an "Accrual Adjustment" condition (i.e ZXXX), when the "Settlement Amount" (i.e RENT) > "Total Accrued Amount" (i.e REAT).

The purpose of the "Accrual Adjustment" condition (based on custom Alternative Calc. of Cond. routine) is to automatically post in FI an "Accruals Adjustment" when the settlement amount is higher than the "current open accruals".

Unfortunately, the custom routine does not properly work when the Settlement Amount is applied at the Product Hierarchy level, as the ZXXX condition is always determined (together with the other conditions) as soon as the amount is distributed (i.e "Distribution Based on Accruals") at the SKU level, as a difference between RENT & REAT.

Given that, we could face the following wrong behavior:

RENT = €1.000 applied at Product Hierarchy A

REAT = €1.200 from Product Hierarchy A

When the amount (at the main item level) is distributed at the SKU level, it can happen that:

SKU1: RENT = 600 // REAT = 700 // ZXXX = Not required, as RENT < REAT (OK)

SKU2: RENT = 300 // REAT = 450 // ZXXX = Not required, as RENT < REAT (OK)

SKU3: RENT = 100 // REAT = 50 // ZXXX = Required, as RENT > REAT (KO)

Basically: as the pricing is determined at the "sub-item level", the custom routine is applied even when not required, when REAT > RENT, at the Product Hierarchy level.

Our question is: is there a standard approach to calculating the ZXXX condition value defined at the main item level (before applying the distribution), and then redistributing the ZXXX amount across SKUs during the distribution process? Typically, pricing at the main item level is not active.

Thank

Michele

entry.title: Re: Batch Determination of components in the Production Order in S/4 1709
entry.content:
Hello Raja,

i just need your advise , i follow the steps in the blog but no automatic batch determination for the component in production order even when i tried to tried to trigger manually i have no result the only result in when i choose w/o class selection

do you know what can the reason ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA –Finding authorization objects for SAP Fiori apps with SU24
entry.content:
Hi @liskaj01 the behaviour you describe is correct. Worth remembering basic principles:

  • not every app needs to appear on a page. Some apps may only be available via app to app navigation or left as lesser alternatives in the app Finder 
  • Business roles + business catalogs are your authorization control. Spaces are not about authorization. 
  • Spaces & pages are about guiding the user on how you want them to work
  • You can share spaces across multiple similar roles and let the authorizations automatically hide tiles that are not relevant to a particular role. 

I don’t quite understand what behaviour you think needs restricting here? Can you explain please?

entry.title: Re: Function Module to Calculate "Extended" Withholding Tax
entry.content: Hi, do you tried with FM_ADV_CALC_WT_AMT ?

entry.title: Re: What is the Fiori App for T-code: S_ALR_87013611 - Cost Centers : Actual/Plan/Variance?
entry.content: Hi, https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('W0081')/S29PCE Try this App

entry.title: Re: Identity and Access Management with Microsoft Entra, Part II: Provisioning to BTP and S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello @MartinRaepple,

Thanks for the very detailed setup instructions in your blog series. It's definitely very helpful.

It seems to me that the SAP Cloud Identity Services Enterprise Application from the gallery does not allow updating a Identity Directory User's Global User Id. The following provisioning attribute mapping is definitely not working for me:

SAP Cloud Platform Identity Authentication Service Attribute
Microsoft Entra ID Attribute
urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:User:userUuidobjectId

although I am able to write the Entra User's objectId in a Identity Directory User's "Custom Attribute 1" (so the following mapping does work):
 

SAP Cloud Platform Identity Authentication Service Attribute
Microsoft Entra ID Attribute
urn:sap:cloud:scim:schemas:extension:custom:2.0:User:attributes:customAttribute1objectId

Just wanted to mention this just in case anyone else runs into this problem.

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
@Sany-Said Thank you for the clear update.

What about vSaaS customers? What is the timeline for them for the no opt out (2H2024) and the universal push (2H2025)?

entry.title: Re: Introducing Joule on Hands-on Practice Sandbox
entry.content: Hello @chen_zhang yes it does

entry.title: can we set up workflow when an order/ quote goes on credit block in public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have requirement to trigger the workflow for quotation or sales order when document is in credit block. In workflow we can add condition to all document like if net value is more than some value then it will trigger workflow but that is not customer specific.

Please advise

entry.title: Re: sap gui gesperrt nach mehreren Fehlversuchen sich anzumelden
entry.content:
Hi,

vielen Dank für die Antwort!

Könntest du bitte mir bitte detaillierter ausführen, wie ich vorgehen soll, was ich machen soll und und wie ich einen ABAP-Report erstellen kann. Was brauche ich dazu?

Vielen Dank!

MFG

F. Proxima

entry.title: Re: How can we customize/override DateAdapter of de.hybri...
entry.content:
Hi,

I can see that you tried to follow the steps described on Help page: Custom Configuration of the HTTP Message Converters. However from the screenshot I can see that you still used the OOTB DateAdapter. Have you tried implementing your own adapter and adding it to the list instead of the OOTB one? Keep in mind that this change will affect only the webservice available in your custom extension. If you wish to implement this change globally you would need to use a mechanism to change OOTB files. A simple way to achieve that is to use buildcallbacks in your custom extension and use ant to replace the OOTB list of adapters with the custom one. You can check an example how to do it in this answer. Hope this helps.

entry.title: Retrieve App Name in API Management by using Policies
entry.content:
1. Background

Once an API has been exposed via the API Management, technically it can be consumed by any applications. Sometimes we have requirement to know who is the caller. One of the solutions is to ask the application put the client id into HTTP header as the X-App-Key, which can be used to determine the application name later. Another soluton is even more straightforward, that just let the applicaiton fill up 'Sender System Name' into the HTTP header as a property like 'SenderService'. However, both of the solutions have a disadvantage, that the application needs an extra step, which might be refused or forgetted.  

Actually, the OAuth Token generated by API Management does content the application information. The above steps with X-App-Key or 'SenderService' are a sort of redundant. Here is the analysis on how to get the application name from the OAuth Token, which is compulsory from the API consumers.

2. Analysis

Turn an API proxy into the debug mode and consume it. Check the policy 'VerifyOAuthToken'. We can see the variable 'developer.app.name' has been set by the framework, as below.

Now let's consume BTP API by using the developer.app.name

This is part of the response:

As a comparison, This is how the application has been registered in the 'API Business Hub Enterprise'.

Once the titile, short text or description information has got, it is not hard to tell the iflow or backend what is the sender system. 

From the high level design's perspective, we can come up with at least two kinds of solutions on it.

  • Solution 1. Set the 'developer.app.name' into HTTP header, and pass it to the CPI iflow.  Then get the application information in the CPI layer.
  • Solution 2. Get the application information in the API management layer by means of policy.

Solution 1 is easier to fulfill and easier to monitor, While solution 2 is more elegant and better modularization.

Solution 2 will be introduct in the below chapters.

3. Prerequisite

This is not a building from scratch tutorial. There are few prerequisites of the configuration which will not be introduced in details here. They have been listed here for the convenience of the new starters.

3.1 OAuth2 Token API

The OAuth2 token API is not mandatory option for API management authentication. whereas it is the chosen one for below tutorial. You can choose other types as well. Please refer to this blog post https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/oauth-2-0-authentication-for-api-management-to-connect-to-cpi/ba-p/13504672 for how to configure OAuth2 token API. 

3.2 Credential of CI

In order to check the effect of the process, an iflow will be wrapped up by the API proxy. Therefore the CI credential is needed to consume the iflow. Please refer here to get or generate service key for CI iflow: https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/creating-service-instance-and-service-key-for-inbound-authentication . make sure the plan is integration-flow

3.3 Create an iflow

The iflow is used to check the effect of the process. just try to make it as simple as possible. you may create your own. Here is mine and you can download it from https://github.com/stephenxue/GetAppName.git 

Make sure the HTTP Header property 'SenderService' is allowed to the iflow

The logic of the iflow is just to read SenderService from HTTP header and put it into the response message as below

4. API Manegment Configuration

4.1 Prepare for credential and URLs

Firstly, please get the CI credential and iflow URL.

Secondly, for consuming BTP Application API, we need a service key for service 'API Management, API portal' and plan 'apiportal-apiaccess'. 

please store the service key. we will use it later. It should look like this

 

{
    "url": "https://ap10apiportal.cfapps.ap10.hana.ondemand.com",
    "clientId": "sb-apiaccess_1721265820743!b9999|api-portal-xsuaa!b160",
    "clientSecret": "73e9ea2d-5213-4e9e-8ccd-fb2ff4d6b0fc$tM3NaIK6owFXqWE3mcdmaokp5pwMfM9hTAOzItuMeslg=",
    "tokenUrl": "https://<client>-8x5whtls.authentication.ap10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token"
}

 

 

 

Thirdly, form the application API URL.

The format of the URL is:

 

https://<url of the above service key>/apiportal/api/1.0/Management.svc/Applications

 

please keep it.

4.2 Maintain Key Value Maps

Altogether 3 KVMs are to be created. 

4.2.1 For storing CI credential

It is better to be an encrpted KVM

4.2.2 For storing Credential for generating API Token

it is better to be an encrypted KVM. fill up the clientId and clientSecret from above chapter

4.2.3 For Storing URLs

Please create it as an un-encrypted KVM. Please fill up the Application API path into URL_API_Application and fill up tokenUrl into URL_API_Token as below

4.3 API Manegement Policy Configuration

The process consists of 11 policies, with 9 of them in the Proxy Endpoint and 2 of them in the Target Endpoint

The whole policies are put into a policy template which can be downloaded from https://github.com/stephenxue/GetAppName.git 

This is the detail configuration information per policy.

4.3.1 Policy OAuthV2

This policy is used to verify OAuth2 token from the consumer request.

 

<OAuthV2 async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
   <!-- By default, VerifyAccessToken expects the access token to be sent in an Authorization header. You can change that default using this element<AccessToken> -->
   <!-- If you want to pass access token in an customer header "access_token": -->
   <!-- <AccessToken>request.header.access_token</AccessToken> -->
   <!-- If you want to pass access token in query param "access_token": -->
   <!-- <AccessToken>request.queryparam.access_token</AccessToken> -->
   <!-- this flag has to be set when you want to work with third-party access tokens -->
   <ExternalAuthorization>false</ExternalAuthorization>
   <!-- valid values are GenerateAccessToken, GenerateAccessTokenImplicitGrant, GenerateAuthorizationCode ,
    RefreshAccessToken , VerifyAccessToken , InvalidateToken , ValidateToken  -->
   <Operation>VerifyAccessToken</Operation>
   <GenerateResponse enabled="true"/><SupportedGrantTypes/>
   <Tokens/>
</OAuthV2>

 

It sets the variable 'developer.app.name' automatically with the application ID.

4.3.2 Policy LookupCache

This is the step reading stored API Token from cache.

 

<!-- configures how cached values should be retrieved at runtime -->
<LookupCache async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
	<!-- configures a unique pointer to a piece of data stored in the cache -->
	<CacheKey>
		<KeyFragment>APIM_Token</KeyFragment>
	</CacheKey>
	<Scope>Global</Scope>
	<!-- the variable to which the cache entry should be assigned after it is looked up -->
	<AssignTo>external_access_token</AssignTo>
</LookupCache>

 

  • if it is successful, it will assign the variable 'external_access_token' and set variable 'lookupcache.ReadTokenForAPIFromCache.cachehit' to true;
  • if it is not successful, it will set variable 'lookupcache.ReadTokenForAPIFromCache.cachehit' to false;
4.3.3 Policy KeyValueMapOperations The First

This step reads URLs which might be used later, including the Application API Path and the API token URL

 

<KeyValueMapOperations mapIdentifier="APIM_AppName" async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
	<!-- PUT stores the key value pair mentioned inside the element -->
   <Get assignTo="URL_API_Token" index='1'>
      <Key>
         <Parameter>URL_API_Token</Parameter> 
      </Key>
   </Get>
   <Get assignTo="URL_API_Application" index='1'>
      <Key>
         <Parameter>URL_API_Application</Parameter> 
      </Key>
   </Get>
	<!-- the scope of the key value map. Valid values are environment, organization, apiproxy and policy -->
	<Scope>environment</Scope>
</KeyValueMapOperations>

 

4.3.4 Policies Renew the API Token

If the token retrieving step failed, it means the token has expired and needs to be renewed. All of the policies in this chapter should have a condition string below for a better performance.

 

lookupcache.ReadTokenForAPIFromCache.cachehit = false

 

4.3.4.1 Policy KeyValueMapOperations The Second

This step reads credential used for generating API Token.

 

<KeyValueMapOperations mapIdentifier="APIM_Credential" async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
	<!-- PUT stores the key value pair mentioned inside the element -->
   <Get assignTo="private.client_id" index='1'>
      <Key>
         <Parameter>client_id</Parameter> 
      </Key>
   </Get>
   <Get assignTo="private.client_secret" index='1'>
      <Key>
         <Parameter>client_secret</Parameter> 
      </Key>
   </Get>
	<!-- the scope of the key value map. Valid values are environment, organization, apiproxy and policy -->
	<Scope>environment</Scope>
</KeyValueMapOperations>

 

4.3.4.2 Policy ServiceCallout The First

This step makes a call to the Token API to retriev the token for the BTP Application API

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ServiceCallout async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <Request>
        <Set>
            <Headers>
                <Header name="Content-Type">application/x-www-form-urlencoded</Header>
            </Headers>
            <FormParams>
                <FormParam name="client_id">{private.client_id}</FormParam>
                <FormParam name="client_secret">{private.client_secret}</FormParam>
                <FormParam name="grant_type">client_credentials</FormParam>
            </FormParams>
            <Verb>POST</Verb>
        </Set>
    </Request>
    <Response>TokenResponse</Response>
    <Timeout>30000</Timeout>
    <HTTPTargetConnection>
        <URL>https://{URL_API_Token}</URL>
    </HTTPTargetConnection>
</ServiceCallout>

 

4.3.4.3 Policy ExtractVariables The First

This step derives response json message from the above step and retrieve the access token. At the same time, it derives token expiry time in second. 

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ExtractVariables async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <JSONPayload>
        <Variable name="external_access_token" type="string">
            <JSONPath>$.access_token</JSONPath>
        </Variable>
        <Variable name="expires_in" type="integer">
            <JSONPath>$.expires_in</JSONPath>
        </Variable>        
    </JSONPayload>
    <Source>TokenResponse</Source>
</ExtractVariables>

 

4.3.4.4 Policy PopulateCache

This step updates the API token into cache so that it can be reuse in future.

 

<!-- configures how cached values should be written at runtime -->
<PopulateCache async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
	<!-- configures a unique pointer to a piece of data stored in the cache -->
	<CacheKey>
		<KeyFragment>APIM_Token</KeyFragment>
	</CacheKey>
	<!-- specifies the cache where the data is to be stored -->
	<Scope>Global</Scope>
	<ExpirySettings>
		<!-- the number of seconds after which a cache entry should expire -->
		<TimeoutInSeconds ref="expires_in"/>
	</ExpirySettings>
	<!-- specifies the variable whose value should be written into cache -->
	<Source>external_access_token</Source>
</PopulateCache>

 

Until this stage, the token has been renewed and stored in the cache.

4.3.5 Policy ServiceCallout The Second

This step makes a call to BTP Application API and get the app name in the response. This is the main step of the process. 

 

<!-- this policy lets you call to an external service from your API flow -->
<ServiceCallout async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
	<!-- The request that gets sent from the API proxy flow to the external service -->
	<Request>
	    <Set>
	        <Headers>
	            <Header name="Authorization">Bearer {external_access_token}</Header>
	        </Headers>
	    </Set>
	</Request>    
	<!-- the variable into which the response from the external service should be stored -->
	<Response>sapapim.tokenresponse</Response>
	<!-- The time in milliseconds that the Service Callout policy will wait for a response from the target before exiting. Default value is 120000 ms -->
	<Timeout>30000</Timeout>
	<HTTPTargetConnection>
		<!-- The URL to the service being called -->
		<URL>https://{URL_API_Application}('{developer.app.name}')?$select=title</URL>
      <!-- The SSL reference to be used to access the https url -->
	</HTTPTargetConnection>
</ServiceCallout>

 

4.3.6 Policy ExtractVariables The Second

This step derives response from above step and get the title field which is the application name. Set it to the HTTP header as the property SenderService

 

<!-- Extract content from the request or response messages, including headers, URI paths, JSON/XML payloads, form parameters, and query parameters -->
<ExtractVariables async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
    <!-- the source variable which should be parsed -->
    <Source>sapapim.tokenresponse</Source>
    <!-- Specifies the XML-formatted message from which the value of the variable will be extracted -->
    <XMLPayload>
        <Namespaces>
            <Namespace prefix="a">http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom</Namespace>
            <Namespace prefix="m">http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata</Namespace>
            <Namespace prefix="d">http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices</Namespace>
        </Namespaces>
        <!-- Specifies variable to which the extracted value will be assigned -->
        <Variable name="request.header.SenderService" type="string">
            <!-- Specifies the XPath defined for the variable -->
            <XPath>/a:entry/a:content/m:properties/d:title</XPath>
        </Variable>
    </XMLPayload>
</ExtractVariables>

 

All 9 policies above are placed in the Proxy Endpoint flow. The two policies below are placed in the Target Endpoint flow. 

4.3.7 Policy KeyValueMapOperations The Third

This step reads credential for CI layer

 

<!-- Key/value pairs can be stored, retrieved, and deleted from named existing maps by configuring this policy by specifying PUT, GET, or DELETE operations -->
<!-- mapIdentifier refers to the name of the key value map -->
<!-- Don't use Key Value Maps to store your logs as this can impact API Proxy runtime flow -->
<KeyValueMapOperations mapIdentifier="SCI_iFlow" async="true" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
	<!-- PUT stores the key value pair mentioned inside the element -->
   <Get assignTo="private.username" index='1'>
      <Key>
         <Parameter>username</Parameter> 
      </Key>
   </Get>
   <Get assignTo="private.password" index='1'>
      <Key>
         <Parameter>password</Parameter> 
      </Key>
   </Get>
	<!-- the scope of the key value map. Valid values are environment, organization, apiproxy and policy -->
	<Scope>environment</Scope>
</KeyValueMapOperations>

 

4.3.8 Policy BasicAuthentication

This step sets the base64 string of the credential for consuming the iFlow

 

<BasicAuthentication async='true' continueOnError='false' enabled='true' xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
 	<!-- Operation can be Encode or Decode -->
   <Operation>Encode</Operation>
   <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>false</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
   <User ref="private.username" />
   <Password ref="private.password" />
   <AssignTo createNew="true">request.header.Authorization</AssignTo>
</BasicAuthentication>

 

Now all policies have been configured. Let's conduct the test for the result. 

5. Unit Test

Create an API proxy for the CI iFlow. Add the above policies to the proxy. Then add the API proxy together with a Token API proxy into a product, say S4_ERP. 

5.1 Test for App01

Register an application for the product called App01. Store the App Secret and App Key

Generate an OAuth2 token by using the above credential.

Now consuming the API Proxy by using the above access_token

We can see that the Application Name App01 has been determined.

5.2 Test for App02

Register an application for the product called App02. Store the App Secret and App Key

Generate an OAuth2 token by using the above credential.

now consume the API proxy by using the above access_token

The Application Name has been determined. If the debug mode has been switched on, we can see that the token renew flow has been bypassed, since the below variable is true.

6. Conclusion

By using the Application ID after the OAuthVerify policy and By consuming the BTP Application API, we can retireve the application name from the OAuth2 token. It is an option for you to implement the logic by means of policy configuration in the SAP API Management. This is the download link for all of the contents configured above. https://github.com/stephenxue/GetAppName.git please take your own risk to use it. 

 

Reference

For Policy Configuration https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-api-management-policies/ba-p/13529965

entry.title: SAP HANA Tenant DB tables connection with another Tenant
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a scenario where we are consuming the DB tables from one tenant to another in Calculation Views and Table Functions. Below is an example where the other Tenant (BD1) DB table is consumed.

When moving these CV's to quality, it should auto assign this to 'BQ1'. Can you please suggest, how this can be achieved?

Your feedback is highly appreciated.

SAP HANA

entry.title: Re: Search string in EBS, part 3 - bank charges
entry.content:
Hi Bohdan,

 

nice post I came to view a couple of times in the last year.

 

I have one requirement now, where I am stuck.

We get a bank charge in the statement and would need to post that with VAT.

 

like:

posting 1:

bank outgoing   vs    bank account 10 

 

posting 2

    bank charge   9

    VAT                1

bank outgoing  10

 

Do you know how this could be realised?

 

 

Thanks in advance

Hein

entry.title: Re: Issue with Loading/Creating Story Reports in Non-Prod...
entry.content: Im also having the same issue, enabled third party cookies, cleared them etc etc and still no success.

entry.title: CodeJam CAP/AI in Vienna, Austria
entry.content:
We have a CodeJam scheduled with the SAP Inside Track in Vienna, Austria on March, the 20th 2025.

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/build-ai-services-using-the-sap-cloud-application-programming-model-and-sap/ev-p/14008974

There are still seats open, if you want to join me for a nice day coding and learning click the link above!

Can't wait to see you in Vienna!

entry.title: Re: Community Member Spotlight: Roberta Fernandes - February 2025 Edition
entry.content:
Congratulations @RobertaFernande. Please keep contributing to the SAP Community. 

Regards

Virinchy

entry.title: can u share your resolution on the error
Re: How can we customize/override DateAdapter of de.hybri...
entry.content: That screenshot is for reference only. But yes we tried to modify the list by adding our custom adapter (Updated screenshot in Post). But it didn't work, Can you please check once if anything missing? Else will try buildcallbacks.

entry.title: Re: cloud connector alerts not receiving via email
entry.content: Hi Ulrich_Schmidt, Issue has been resolved. Issue with SMTP server for few users. Thanks for the quick response

entry.title: Re: wcm issue
Re: wcm issue
entry.content: Sebastian, thank you. It works for me - config. item "Generate Basic Settings" (t-code WCC3).

entry.title: Re: Effective date when status is "Inactive" for a Depart...
entry.content:
Hi Kayla,

Thanks for your response but there is a challenge. Let's suppose for a department, couple of records exists as follows:

i) Effective Date 01.12.2024 and End Date 28.02.2025 (Active Only)
ii) Effective Date 01.03.2025 and End Date 31.12.9999 (Active Only, there are few changes in department hence new record inserted for department).

Using the mentioned logic, system considers 1st record only (Effective Date from 01.12.2024) to validate date and end date validation will fail because End Date is 28.02.2025. System does not consider next record (which is also active) end date i.e. 31.12.9999.
I tested it and system is considering end date of latest department record only. Please advise.

entry.title: 'Free' text from classroom trainings registration
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

When user is trying to register for a class they see a text as 'Free' as the pricing is not defined for this class.

Is there anyway to remove that text. Any lead here is appreciated.

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Screenshot to add validation
entry.content:
need to know the path from where you have put validation with screen shot, I also have same requirement but amount limit is 10k.

I have put the validation in OB28 but didnt get the expected result can anybody give step by step screenshot.

Pre-requisites:

SYST-TCODE = 'FBCJ' AND ( BKPF-BUKRS = '1020' AND BSEG-HKONT = '606901' )

Check:

BSEG-WRBTR <= '20000.00'

Message:

Error: Amounts exceeds 20000

BSEG-SHKZG = 'H' by Ramana BommannagariRamana BommannagariYesterday 4:36 PM

BSEG-SHKZG = 'H'

entry.title: Item category L in RFQ doc category R
entry.content:
Hi Experts, I have created a subcontracting PR and created a RFQ (Doc category R) however Item category is not copied to RFQ (EKPO-PSTYP= 0). When I am checking the RFQ in Manage RFQ app item category field is not appearing. Can you please help with the issue.

 

    

 

Regards,

Aniket.

entry.title: Re: sap gui gesperrt nach mehreren Fehlversuchen sich anzumelden
entry.content:
Hallo,

reden wir eigentlich noch über die Developer-Ausgabe? Die ist prinzipiell vorrangig für ABAP-Entwickler interessant, daher wundert mich die Frage. Oder besteht das Problem auf einem anderen System? 

Wie auch immer, Anlage eines ABAP-Reports in Kurzform: mit einem User mit den entsprechenden Berechtigungen (in der Developer-Ausgabe sind das die User DEVELOPER und BWDEVELOPER) in einem Mandanten anmelden, der für Programmentwicklung offen ist (Einstellungen in SCC4 und SE03), Transaktion SE80 oder SE38 oder Eclipse verwenden und dort ein ABAP-Programm anlegen. Attribute ausfüllen, Transportauftrag verwenden/erstellen oder lokale Entwicklungsklasse verwenden, Source-Code einfügen, sichern, aktivieren. 

Viele Grüße

Jan

entry.title: Issue with Enter Event in Fiori GUI Apps (MIGO, MM03)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are facing an issue in Fiori with the GUI apps MIGO, MM03

When entering a material number in the selection screen (or in MIGO's material field) and pressing Enter, nothing happens. In the SAP GUI, this action triggers the Enter event, but when opening the same apps in Fiori, the event does not work.

The behavior is similar across different browsers.

When testing in incognito mode, the Enter event works in any of the apps—but only the first time. Within the same session, if we try the same action in a different app (or even reopen the same app a second time), the Enter event no longer works.

We have already cleared the browser cache, but this did not resolve the issue.

What could be causing this problem? Is there any way to prevent this behavior?

Thank you,
Veronika

entry.title: Re: s_alr_87012357
entry.content: Could you please verify the posting dates of the transactions that were not included in the VAT settlement? In most cases, the documents were posted on dates different from those used for the VAT settlement.

entry.title: Re: ABAPTRIAL_2022_SP01-Error message: ‘Password login no longer possible - too many failed attempts
entry.content: As said in the blog post "ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now", please add the tag #abap_trial to the question to make it visible to SAP people.

entry.title: Re: Community Member Spotlight: Roberta Fernandes - February 2025 Edition
entry.content:
Congratulations, Roberta, on this inspiring interview!  It's amazing to see how your journey, from your first steps in 2017 to organizing major events, truly reflects the spirit of the SAP Community: collaboration, learning, and passion for knowledge.

Your dedication to mentoring new professionals and your willingness to share experiences highlight the positive impact you have on our community. I'm confident that you will be a fantastic SAP Mentor in the future!

entry.title: Re: Failed to subscribe Build Apps in BTP Trial
entry.content:
Hi @RebeccaYang  ,

I am facing the same error.  

SAP Build Process Automation worked fine.  But Build App did not work.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Salvador 2025
entry.content: Excelente oportunidade!!!

entry.title: Combining POs with different Purchase organizations in one inbound delivery
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I faced a problem with creation of inbound delivery. It should refer to few POs with different Purchasing organizations. Does anyone have such experience? I tried but the system returns an error "delivery split because the partners are different. Message no. VL014"
and then it splits the inbound delivery on the quantity of purch organizations.

Is this possible to switch off this option and combine all POs with different Purch orgs in one inb deliv?

I tried to look in SPRO but the only criteria for split there is warehouse. 

Will be very much obliged for any ideas,

Elena

entry.title: Hi all,I am new to SAP CRM Functional role,how to change the configuration on CIC screen for "Alerts
entry.content: Hi all, I am new to SAP CRM Functional role, Please help with how to change the configuration on CIC screen for "Alerts"

entry.title: Re: ⚡ Vamos realizar 1º SAP Meet-Up do ano de 2025!
entry.content: É incrível ver a comunidade SAP Fortaleza reunida para compartilhar experiências, fortalecer conexões e alinhar as ações para o tão aguardado SAP Inside Track Fortaleza 2025! Eventos como esse mostram a força da nossa comunidade, unindo aprendizado, networking e, claro, muita diversão!

entry.title: Procurement of Health Insurance premium for employees in S/4 HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have a scenario involving the procurement of health insurance, where the purchase is based on a rate basis, with the rate varying according to the age bracket of the insured employee and their family members.

  • The health insurance agreement is structured on a Pro Rata basis, meaning the charges apply only for the covered period, rather than a fixed quantity or total value.
  • New Employee Addition: A new employee can be added to the existing health insurance agreement at any time during the year. The premium for the addition is calculated from the month of inclusion until the agreement's remaining validity period, rather than for a full year.
  • Employee Exit: If an employee leaves the organization during the agreement period, the premium charges will be deducted only for the months they were employed.
  • Premium rates vary based on the age brackets of the employee and their family members, necessitating a dynamic rate calculation mechanism.

Kindly provide us the most suitable approach to procure and map health insurance in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, considering the above factors. Kindly suggest an appropriate process and configuration to achieve this requirement effectively.

Thanks!

Regards,

Sabarinathan K

entry.title: Re: Relative ADT Link to a Method of a Class
entry.content:
Hi,

if you install ABAPGit, there comes a class (ZCL_ABAPGIT_ADT_LINK) and method (GENERATE), which exactly implements this pattern (Thomas mentioned).

 

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: SAC Advance Formula Error while copying data from one model to other model
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to copy data from one model A to another planning model B with MODEL and LINK command. With this I also want to populate dimensions of Model B using properties of Model A dimension. I am using following script but it gives me error of Scope redirection.

//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
//Set Configurations Definitions for the Advanced Formulas.
//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONFIG.TIME_HIERARCHY = FISCALYEAR
CONFIG.GENERATE_UNBOOKED_DATA = OFF
//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
//The data region against which the formulas will be executed.
//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = ("MDP")
MEMBERSET [d/FISCAL_MONTH] = BASEMEMBER([d/FISCAL_MONTH].[h/FYP], %FISCAL_YEAR%)
MEMBERSET [d/DATA_SOURCE] = ("UPLOAD_PTA_SLS")
//MEMBERSET [d/ACCOUNT] = "CGRETSL"
//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
//Calculation and Data Writing
//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Link PTA Actuals Model to transfer data
MODEL [SaFARI - PTA Actuals]
ENDMODEL
 
// Copy Data to Planning model and assign properties of Base Code to Estimate Code, Factory and Product to respective dimension
DATA(
    [d/Measures] = "MDP", 
[d/ESTIMATE_CODE] = [SaFARI - PTA Actuals].[d/BASECODE].[p/EST_CODE],
[d/FACTORY] = [SaFARI - PTA Actuals].[d/BASECODE].[p/FACTORY],
    [d/SaFARI_PRODUCT] = [SaFARI - PTA Actuals].[d/BASECODE].[p/PRODUCT]
 
) = LINK(
    [SaFARI - PTA Actuals],
    [d/Version] = "public.Actual",
    [d/Measures] = "MDP"
)
 
------
Below are the error messages I get with this code.
- There is violation of scope redirection in the calculation expressions.
- The dimension [SaFARI - PTA Actuals].BASECODE] is not allowed to be used with linked model because it is shared dimension.
 
Appreciate any help on this. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: can we set up workflow when an order/ quote goes on c...
entry.content:
Hi, you can try to add your own WF condition by using badi SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF. 

Check this: 
SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Flexible Workflow with new cus... - SAP Community

KR 
Veronika

entry.title: Error in downloading report -Purchase Register (Item+Service)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am writing to seek your assistance with an issue we are encountering when exporting data from SAP Business One to Excel through Copy Table and Export to Excel. We have observed the following problems:
Disorganized Data: When exporting data, it does not appear in an organized manner in Excel.

 

Missing Data: Occasionally, the exported data shows fewer entries compared to the original report in SAP Business One.

 

File Repair Issues:
When the file contains a larger amount of data, Excel displays an error message stating it was unable to open the file and attempts to repair it.

 

These issues are significantly impacting our ability to efficiently analyze and utilize the exported data. I would appreciate any guidance or solutions you could provide to resolve these problems.


Please find attached, the screenshot of the error.

 

 

Regards,

Gazanfar Ali Shaikh

entry.title: Re: How can we customize/override DateAdapter of de.hybri...
entry.content:
Assuming that you have an OCC extension (e.g., customocc) generated from the yocc template and requiring commercewebservices, you can define a custom DateAdapter by following these steps:

  • Create CustomDateAdapter that extends XmlAdapter<String, Date>
  • Implement the marshal() and unmarshal() methods
  • Add the following bean definition to resources/occ/v2/trainingocc/web/spring/customocc-web-spring.xml

 

<bean class="org.springframework.beans.factory.config.MethodInvokingFactoryBean">
    <property name="targetObject" ref="customJaxbContextFactory" />
    <property name="targetMethod" value="setTypeAdapters" />
    <property name="arguments">
        <list value-type="java.lang.Class">
            <value>your.package.customocc.jaxb.adapters.CustomDateAdapter</value>
            <value>de.hybris.platform.webservicescommons.jaxb.adapters.StringMapAdapter</value>
            <value>de.hybris.platform.webservicescommons.jaxb.adapters.XSSStringAdapter</value>
        </list>
    </property>
</bean>

 

  • Build the code with ant all command
  • Start server

I tried this on my local environment and successfully customized the output for Date attributes. The only drawback of this solution is that if SAP adds a new adapter to the customJaxbContextFactory bean, you will also need to add it to your bean definition.

To prevent this issue, we should remove DateAdapter from the list and add our CustomAdapter. However, I couldn't find an easy way to do this. I was able to achieve it using the following bean definitions, but it does not seem as simple and clear as the previous definition.

<bean id="customJaxbContextFactoryTypeAdaptersList" class="org.springframework.beans.factory.config.MethodInvokingFactoryBean">
    <property name="targetObject" ref="customJaxbContextFactory"/>
    <property name="targetMethod" value="getTypeAdapters"/>
</bean>

<bean class="org.springframework.beans.factory.config.MethodInvokingFactoryBean">
    <property name="targetObject" ref="customJaxbContextFactoryTypeAdaptersList"/>
    <property name="targetMethod" value="remove"/>
    <property name="arguments">
        <list value-type="java.lang.Class">
            <value>de.hybris.platform.webservicescommons.jaxb.adapters.DateAdapter</value>
        </list>
    </property>
</bean>

<bean class="org.springframework.beans.factory.config.MethodInvokingFactoryBean">
    <property name="targetObject" ref="customJaxbContextFactoryTypeAdaptersList"/>
    <property name="targetMethod" value="add"/>
    <property name="arguments">
        <list value-type="java.lang.Class">
            <value>your.package.customocc.jaxb.adapters.CustomDateAdapter</value>
        </list>
    </property>
</bean>

<bean class="org.springframework.beans.factory.config.MethodInvokingFactoryBean">
    <property name="targetObject" ref="customJaxbContextFactory" />
    <property name="targetMethod" value="setTypeAdapters" />
    <property name="arguments">
        <list>
            <ref bean="customJaxbContextFactoryTypeAdaptersList"/>
        </list>
    </property>
</bean>

You can choose whichever approach you prefer—both work and are valid options.

entry.title: Re: SM58 tRFC errors with text: "SAP ArchiveLink: Obj. type not assigned to storage"
entry.content: Hi, I'm facing the same issue. Did you find a way to identify what was triggering the tRFC errors?

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: Manager Form Eligibility Rules - Variable Pay Management
entry.content: Hi @xavierlegarrec, thank you very much for your feedback. This issue is resolved. The date did not cause the issue because it was set up as 01/01/2025. However, the issue was rel
